nasb.text: and worn-out and patched sandals on their feet, and worn-out clothes on themselves; and all the bread of their provision was dry and had become crumbled.

esv.text: with worn-out, patched sandals on their feet, and worn-out clothes. And all their provisions were dry and crumbly.

cnv.text: 腳上穿著補過的舊鞋，身穿舊衣服，所帶的食物又乾又碎。

ccb.text: 穿着缝补过的旧鞋和破烂衣服，带着又干又发霉的饼，
